testcase.name: TC110 — AI Assistant › 1) AI assistant page loads successfully
TC110 — AI Assistant › 2) chat input area is present
TC110 — AI Assistant › 3) typing and submitting a question sends a message

failure.message: TC150-ai-assistant.spec.ts:112:3 3) typing and submitting a question sends a message

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › TC150-ai-assistant.spec.ts:112:3 › TC110 — AI Assistant › 3) typing and submitting a question sends a message
TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /send|ask|submit/i }).first() - locator resolved to <button disabled type="button" aria-label="Send message" class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[var(--color-primary)]/30 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 bg-black dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black hover:bg-gray-800 dark:hover:bg-gray-200 scale-100">…</button> - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable - retrying click action - waiting 20ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable 2 × retrying click action - waiting 100ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not enabled 18 × retrying click action - waiting 500ms - waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not enabled - retrying click action - waiting 500ms

testcase.name: TC110 — AI Assistant › 6) conversation history is accessible
TC110 — AI Assistant › 7) sending a follow-up question maintains context

failure.message: TC150-ai-assistant.spec.ts:240:3 7) sending a follow-up question maintains context

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › TC150-ai-assistant.spec.ts:240:3 › TC110 — AI Assistant › 7) sending a follow-up question maintains context
Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)
Expected: >= 2 Received: 1

testcase.name: TC110 — AI Assistant › 8) AI assistant has a chat-like layout with messages
